title: Larry Campbell
compiled_truth: Larry Campbell is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-03-18), Larry Campbell sent 794 and received 788 emails, totalling 1582 interactions. Top correspondents: [William Kendrick](people/william-kendrick) (191), [Rich Jolly](people/rich-jolly) (136), [John Shafer](people/john-shafer) (129), [Louis Soldano](people/louis-soldano) (110), [Butch Russell](people/butch-russell) (74). Mailbox folders observed: _sent_mail, contacts, deleted_items, enron_power, inbox, power.
